sha256:f31d6e49921d96a7d72529bf0cd40b217: mutation CreateUser($email: String!, $name: String!) { createUser(name: $name, email: $email) { data { email id name } } }
sha256:63e27fc6a126cfb52479a1b88708fafc5: mutation UpdateUser($email: String!, $id: Int!, $name: String!) { updateUser(id: $id, name: $name, email: $email) { data { email id name } } }
sha256:2a1ab43b604c0ee0a36f544379f7e67ba: query GetUsers($query: String) { users(query: $query) { data { email id name } } }
sha256:c59788ec78321861a55cf9c17eb009107: query GetUser($id: Int!) { user(id: $id) { data { email id name } } }
